title: Refresh Taxonomy Lists When Toggling Between Metrics
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Not Related taxonomy list to refresh automatically when I navigate to the next or previous metric using the arrow buttons, so that I see the correct unassigned topics for each metric without manually refreshing.
description: Fixes the sidebar to reload the Not Related taxonomy values (Topics, Line of Business) when the user navigates between metrics using the Previous/Next arrow buttons. Previously, toggling between metrics did not trigger a refresh of the taxonomy assignment lists, causing stale data to display.
acceptance_criteria: Navigating to the next metric via the right arrow refreshes the Not Related taxonomy list
Navigating to the previous metric via the left arrow refreshes the Not Related taxonomy list
Related taxonomy values update correctly for the newly selected metric
No stale taxonomy data remains visible after navigation
ux_changes: Previous/Next navigation now triggers a refresh of both Related and Not Related taxonomy lists in the sidebar, ensuring accurate data for the current metric.
implementation_notes: Navigation event handlers now trigger the taxonomy data fetch for the newly selected metric, refreshing both Related and Not Related lists in the sidebar.
comment_summary: Quick implementation — developer completed and submitted for review promptly.
